It was created to offer a history lesson to the defeated Germans.
It was created to delegitimize the traditional German elite.

It has six German organizations.
It has a purpose to try defendants.
It has a purpose to assemble irrefutable evidence of Nazi war crimes.
It has a purpose to offer a history lesson to the defeated Germans.
It has a purpose to delegitimize the traditional German elite.
It has charges of war crimes and crimes against humanity.
It has the Holocaust as a major focus.
It has twelve further trials conducted by the United States against lower-level perpetrators.
It has innovation of holding individuals responsible for violations of international law.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the crime of plotting and waging aggressive war.

It is characterized by war crimes.
It is characterized by crimes against humanity.
It is characterized by the Holocaust.
It is characterized by retroactive criminalization of aggression.
It is characterized by holding individuals responsible for violations of international law.
HeldIn: It was held in the Palace of Justice in Nuremberg.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by proposals for how to punish the defeated Nazi leaders.
It was influenced by the Nuremberg Charter.
It was influenced by the Moscow Declaration.
It was influenced by Aron Trainin's concept of crimes against peace.
It was influenced by the United States Department of War drawing up plans for an international tribunal.
It was influenced by the London Conference.
It was influenced by the British proposal to define crimes against humanity.
It was influenced by Article 7 of the charter.
It was influenced by Article 8 of the charter.
IsA: It is the International Military Tribunal (IMT).
It is a demonstration of the superiority of the Western system.
It is an international military tribunal.
KnownFor: It is known for holding individuals responsible for violations of international law.
It is known for the crime of plotting and waging aggressive war.
It is known for war crimes.
It is known for crimes against humanity.
It is known for the Holocaust.
OccurredBetween: It occurred between 20 November 1945 and 1 October 1946.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Second World War.
PerformedBy: It was performed by the Soviet Union.
It was performed by the United Kingdom.

UsedFor: It is used for retributive purposes.
It is used for educational purposes.
UsedTo: It is used to try the defendants.
